title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVII. Relics.
content:
Who comes here?
            A grenadier.
        What do you want?
            A pot of beer.
        Where is your money?
            I've forgot.
        Get you gone,
            You drunken sot!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
